'''Galub slugs''' were giant, grub-white [[Ocean/Legends|sea]] parasites native to [[Spira/Legends|Spira]]. They adhered to large sea animals to suck their [[Blood/Legends|blood]]. Generally very unintelligent, they would sometimes mistake passing boats for potential hosts, making them somewhat of a hazard to yachting tourists.

==Description==
The Galub slug was an [[Ocean/Legends|ocean]]-dwelling parasite native to the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Spira/Legends|Spira]]. Capable of reaching a length of two [[Meter/Legends|meters]], Galub slugs had the ability to adhere to any solid surface using a powerful form of suction. They did this to attach to large sea animals in order to suck their [[Blood/Legends|blood]]. Non-[[Sentience/Legends|sentient]], they were also unintelligent and would mistake the hulls of [[Boat/Legends|boats]] for large sea animals and attach themselves to the unsuspecting passerby. The Galub slug possessed a thick, [[Color/Legends|grub-white]] hide which was strong enough to deflect [[Spear/Legends|spears]], but not [[Blaster/Legends|blaster]] fire.<ref name="TSR" />

==History==
During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], a group of [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] agents were participating in the [[345th annual Spira Regatta Open]] when a sea slug attached itself to their [[Yacht (aquatic)/Legends|yacht]], slowing them. The Rebels were forced to use their blasters to free their vessel.<ref name="TSR" />

==Appearances==
*{{JournalCite|1|The Spira Regatta|reprint=1}} {{1st}}
